prompt: A compact folding quadcopter drone. A central body carries four hinged arms with motor pods and rotors at their tips, plus simple landing skids and a small nose camera. Make it detailed and realistic. Each rotor spins continuously about its motor axis, each arm folds on a revolute hinge at the body root, and the camera tilts on a horizontal revolute axis.
label: openai low
